shots.title: Core prep module — types, plan generation, formatting
Core enrich module + slope enrich CLI + tests
run.sh integration — prep injection, token routing, auto-enrichment

bunker_locations: walkDir recursive traversal could be slow in large repos — acceptable for tests/ directory size
Token estimation bytes/4 * 1.2 is approximate — ±20% vs actual tokenizer count
extractHazards returns all bunker_locations when modules array is empty — intentional but potentially noisy
yardage_book_updates: src/core/prep.ts: PrepPlan/TicketData types, resolveTicket (roadmap→backlog), buildQueryText, collectTestFiles (recursive walk + stem matching), findSimilarTickets (keyword overlap), extractHazards (bunker_location substring match), generatePrepPlan, formatPrepPlan
src/core/enrich.ts: EnrichedTicket/EnrichedBacklog types, estimateTokens (bytes/4*1.2), enrichTicket (primary ≥0.55 / related ≥0.4 score tiers), enrichBacklog (batch + _enrichMeta versioning)
src/cli/commands/prep.ts: slope prep <ticket-id> [--json] [--top=5] — follows context.ts pattern with store lifecycle
src/cli/commands/enrich.ts: slope enrich [backlog-path] [--output] [--with-plans] [--top=5] — atomic write via tmp+rename
slope-loop/run.sh: select_model() token escalation (>24K→API), pre-sprint auto-enrichment (_enrichMeta version check), per-ticket prep plan injection (~400 token budget)
course_management_notes: All 4 tickets landed without reverts or test failures — clean execution
Both code and architect reviews approved with 0 blocking findings
4 low-severity notes + 6 informational observations — no action required for v1
Shared helpers factored into prep.ts and reused by enrich.ts — clean dependency direction (enrich→prep)
46 new tests added (25 core/prep + 11 core/enrich + 5 cli/prep + 5 cli/enrich), total suite: 2028 tests
Builds on S46 embedding infrastructure — embed(), deduplicateByFile(), hasEmbeddingSupport(), SqliteSlopeStore
